---
name: docs-refresh
description: >
  Refresh existing documentation against current code and project doc standards.
---

# Docs Refresh

Use this skill to update existing docs safely.

## Workflow

1. Read the target doc and the closest source files.
2. Read any local docs contribution guide or template.
3. Verify claims against current code.
4. Preserve ownership boundaries:
   - keep canonical facts in owner docs
   - link to owner docs instead of duplicating large sections
   - move or shorten material that does not belong
5. Prefer stable repo-relative links.
6. Run the docs audit or link checker when available.
7. Report what changed and any remaining uncertainty.
